title: pilosella caballeroi
intro: Pilosella caballeroi is a rare and endangered plant species, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae), found primarily in the Iberian Peninsula. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, derived from its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Pilosella caballeroi is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used in herbal medicine to treat a range of conditions, although its use should be approached with caution due to limited scientific research and potential side effects.
